core_payload.content:
# Vault Steward Archive Index

## Purpose
Vault Steward Archive Index holds rotated Vault Steward run snapshots so active operational capsules remain current-only and low-noise.

## Retention Contract
- Active queue, latest, and plan capsules describe only the current run.
- Completed run snapshots are preserved as archived run atoms under this hub.
- Archived run atoms remain available for explicit audit and lineage queries.

## Current Entries
- `capsule.operations.vault-steward.archive.vault-steward-1773020624098.v1` — archived completed Dream run rotated from the active queue on 2026-03-11T13:33:44Z.

neuro_concentrate.summary: Vault Steward Archive Index is the Dream-side run-history hub for rotated Vault Steward operational capsules. It preserves completed run snapshots while keeping active queue state current-only.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Minted Dream-side archive hub so completed Vault Steward runs can rotate out of the active queue without losing audit lineage.
